summary: The diff implements most of the three requirements. REQ-1 (separate bride/groom photo uploads) is broadly implemented across CoupleDetailsStep, InvitationEditor, InvitationFormContext, backend main.mo, HeroSection, and CoupleIntroduction. REQ-2 (Dashboard layout fix) is addressed. REQ-3 (Header CTA hiding) is addressed in Header.tsx. One notable gap exists: the backend stores bridePhoto/groomPhoto as Storage.ExternalBlob rather than optional Text fields as specified. The migration.mo file is a hallucinated addition not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend Invitation record stores bridePhoto and groomPhoto as separate optional Text fields
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo and migration.mo store bridePhoto and groomPhoto as '?Storage.ExternalBlob' (ExternalBlob type), not as '?Text' as specified in the requirement and acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Existing invitations with a legacy single couple photo field do not crash
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show evidence of handling a legacy 'couplePhoto' field on existing invitations. The migration sets bridePhoto/groomPhoto to null for old records but there is no evidence that old records with a 'couplePhoto' field are handled gracefully in the frontend or backend without crashing.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate migration module file (backend/migration.mo) was added with OldActor/NewActor types and a migration run function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention creating a standalone migration.mo file. The requirement only asks for the backend Invitation type in main.mo to be updated with bridePhoto and groomPhoto fields. A dedicated migration module was not requested.
